name: 3 Tier Can Pantry Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your cans sorted in a stylish way with the 3-Tier Can Pantry Organizer from Brightroom™. This white can organizer features a three-tiered, wired design to help keep the cans organized and handy while complementing a variety of decor styles. Made of steel in a powder-coated finish, this freestanding can organizer also has a stackable design to help you save space.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
